section:
KTN::Stacker Class Reference KTN::Stacker
The Stacker class is a derived class of AlgoBaseV3 and implements the stacking algorithm. This algorithm "seeds" price levels in an automated fashion based on input parameters and current market conditions.
#include <Stacker.hpp>
Inheritance diagram for KTN::Stacker:
Public Member Functions
Stacker (AlgoInitializer p)
Constructs a Stacker object.
virtual ~Stacker ()
Destroys the Stacker object.
void onJson (std::string json) override
Handles the JSON input.
void onLaunch (std::string json) override
Handles the launch event.
void onCalculate () override
Calculates the algorithm.
void onTrade (int index, double price, double size, int aggressor) override
Handles the trade event.
void onMktData (int index) override
Handles the market data event.
void minOrderExecution (KTN::OrderPod &ord, bool hedgeSent) override
Handles the minimum order execution event.
void minOrderCancel (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
Handles the minimum order cancel event.
void minOrderCancelReplaceReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text) override
Handles the minimum order cancel replace reject event.
void minOrderCancelReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text) override
Handles the minimum order cancel reject event.
void onHedgeOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price, uint16_t stratid) override
Handles the hedge order sent event.
void onOrderSent (char *clordid, uint64_t reqid, int32_t secid, KOrderSide::Enum side, uint32_t qty, int32_t price, KOrderAlgoTrigger::Enum trig) override
Handles the order sent event.
void Enable (bool bEnable) override
Enables or disables the algorithm.
void ResetPosition () override
Resets the position.
void Print () override
Prints the algorithm details.
void ToggleCommand (int id) override
Toggles a command.
void Restart () override
Restarts the algorithm.
vector< string > Symbols ()
Gets the list of symbols.
Public Member Functions inherited from KTN::AlgoBaseV3
AlgoBaseV3 (AlgoInitializer params)
Constructs a new AlgoBaseV3 object.
virtual ~AlgoBaseV3 ()
Destructor for AlgoBaseV3.
std::string GUID ()
Returns the globally unique identifier (GUID) of the algorithm.
void Poll ()
Polls the system for events.
virtual void onEngineJson (EngineCommand &cmd)
Processes algo engine-specific commands.
virtual void onHeartbeat (int msgseqnum)
Handles session heartbeat events.
virtual void onSessionStatus (std::string exch, int mktsegid, int protocol, std::string desc, std::string state)
Handles session status updates.
void onSpreadLegOrderExecution (KTN::Order &ord)
Executes spread leg orders.
virtual void minOrderAck (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order acknowledgement is received.
virtual void minOrderModify (KTN::OrderPod &ord) override
This method is called when a minimum order modification is received.
virtual void minOrderReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
Handles order rejection events.
virtual void minOrderCancelReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void minOrderCancelReplaceReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const std::string &text)
virtual void Shutdown ()
Shuts down the algorithm.
void shutdownHandler ()
Shuts down the algorithm handler.
virtual void onMktDataBidAsk (const algomd &md)
Handles bid-ask market data updates.
virtual void onMktDataTrade (const algomd &md)
Handles trade market data updates.

AlgoMktDataCallback ()
Default constructor for AlgoMktDataCallback.
virtual ~AlgoMktDataCallback ()
Virtual destructor for AlgoMktDataCallback.
virtual void onStateChange (int state)
This method is called when the state of the algorithm changes.

virtual void onSessionStatus (string exch, int mktsegid, int protocol, string desc, string state)=0
This method is called when the session status changes.
virtual void minOrderReject (KTN::OrderPod &ord, const string &text)=0
This method is called when a minimum order rejection is received.

void AddCmeSymbol (std::string symbol)

int32_t getCertSecId (std::string symbol)
int32_t getProdSecIdFromCert (long secid)

std::string m_Name
Detailed Description
The Stacker class is a derived class of AlgoBaseV3 and implements the stacking algorithm. This algorithm "seeds" price levels in an automated fashion based on input parameters and current market conditions.
Constructor & Destructor Documentation
Stacker() StackerKTN::Stacker KTN::StackerStacker
KTN::Stacker::Stacker (AlgoInitializer p)
Constructs a Stacker object.
Parameters
p
The AlgoInitializer object.
References KTN::notify::Slacker::InitAndRun().
~Stacker() ~StackerKTN::Stacker KTN::Stacker~Stacker
KTN::Stacker::~Stacker ( )[virtual]
Destroys the Stacker object.
Member Function Documentation
Enable() EnableKTN::Stacker KTN::StackerEnable
void KTN::Stacker::Enable (bool bEnable)[override], [virtual]
Enables or disables the algorithm.
Parameters
bEnable
The enable flag.
Implements KTN::AlgoBaseV3.
References OrderManagerV5::ClearDeadOrders(), algometa::Enabled, instrument::lastAsk, instrument::lastBid, instrument::lastSentBuyPrice, and instrument::lastSentSellPrice.
Referenced by minOrderExecution(), onJson(), and ResetPosition().

Handles the minimum order cancel event.

ord
The OrderPod object.
Reimplemented from KTN::AlgoBaseV3.

Implements KTN::SessionCallback.

Implements KTN::SessionCallback.

Handles the minimum order execution event.

ord
The OrderPod object.
hedgeSent

qty

price

stratid
